remember: Students will be able to recall and state the definition and properties of inverse trigonometric functions.
Students will be able to recall and write the range and domain of various inverse trigonometric functions.
Students will be able to recall and state the composite functions involving inverse trigonometric functions and their simplification.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of one-to-one and onto functions with specific reference to inverse trigonometric functions.
Students will be able to understand the geometric representation of inverse trigonometric functions and their periodic nature.
Students will be able to understand the concept of principal value branch of inverse trigonometric functions.
apply: Students will be able to apply the properties of inverse trigonometric functions to simplify various trigonometric expressions.
Students will be able to apply the concept of inverse trigonometric functions to solve problems on the range and domain of trigonometric functions.
Students will be able to apply the properties of inverse trigonometric functions to solve problems on composite functions.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze and compare the properties of various inverse trigonometric functions.
Students will be able to analyze the periodic nature of inverse trigonometric functions and their relation with principal value branch.
Students will be able to analyze and solve problems involving the composition and simplification of inverse trigonometric functions.

ncert_objectives: State the definition and properties of inverse trigonometric functions.
Write the range and domain of various inverse trigonometric functions.
State the composite functions involving inverse trigonometric functions and simplify them.
board_exam_objectives: Definition and properties of inverse trigonometric functions.
Range and domain of inverse trigonometric functions.
Composite functions involving inverse trigonometric functions.
Simplification of trigonometric expressions using inverse trigonometric functions.
Solving problems on range and domain of trigonometric functions using inverse trigonometric functions.
Composite functions of inverse trigonometric functions and their simplification.
